Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.rest.client

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.apachehttpclient45
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.apachehttpclient50
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.assertion
Fluent assertion classes for HTTP response validation in the org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng REST client.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.jetty
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.okhttp
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.remote
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock
REST Server Mock API
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.client used by org.apache.juneau.rest.client
    Class
    Description
    BasicRestLogger
    Convenience RestLogger implementation that routes log entries to a System.Logger.
    BasicRestLogger.Builder
    Fluent builder for BasicRestLogger.
    BodyConverter
    Converts a Java object passed to RestRequest.body(Object) into a TransportBody.
    BodyConverter.ThrowingConverter
    A checked function used by BodyConverter.of(Class, ThrowingConverter).
    CollectionFormat
    Specifies how collection-valued query/form parameters are serialized to a single string.
    HttpTransport
    SPI for pluggable HTTP transports.
    HttpTransportProvider
    ServiceLoader SPI for auto-discovering HttpTransport implementations on the classpath.
    JavaHttpTransport
    HttpTransport implementation backed by the JDK's built-in HttpClient.
    JavaHttpTransportBuilder
    Fluent builder for JavaHttpTransport.
    RecordStreamBody
    A streaming HTTP request body that emits its content through a token/record-streaming cursor.
    ResponseBody
    A fluent accessor for an HTTP response body returned by RestResponse.
    ResponseHeader
    A fluent accessor for a named HTTP response header.
    RestCallException
    Exception thrown when an HTTP call fails at the REST client level (e.g. unexpected status code, body deserialization failure, or interceptor rejection).
    RestCallInterceptor
    Lifecycle interceptor for REST calls made by RestClient.
    RestClient
    Next-generation transport-agnostic REST client.
    RestClient.Builder
    Fluent builder for RestClient.
    RestLogEntry
    Structured log entry produced after every RestRequest.run() invocation.
    RestLogEntry.Builder
    Builder for RestLogEntry.
    RestLogger
    Pluggable logging interface for REST calls made by RestClient.
    RestLogLevelResolver
    Determines the System.Logger.Level for a RestLogEntry.
    RestLogLevelResolver.RuleBuilder
    Fluent builder for ordered predicate-based RestLogLevelResolver instances.
    RestRequest
    Fluent builder for a single HTTP request.
    RestResponse
    An HTTP response returned by RestRequest.run().
    SerializerBody
    A repeatable HttpBody that serializes a POJO straight to the transport output stream.
    TransportBody
    The body of a transport-layer request — a thin wrapper around HttpBody that gives transports a stable contract without needing to know about higher-level body types.
    TransportException
    Thrown by HttpTransport.execute(TransportRequest) when a network-level error occurs (e.g. connection refused, timeout, SSL handshake failure).
    TransportHeader
    An HTTP header name/value pair as seen by the transport layer.
    TransportRequest
    A fully-resolved, transport-layer HTTP request.
    TransportRequest.Builder
    Fluent builder for TransportRequest.
    TransportResponse
    A transport-layer HTTP response.
    TransportResponse.Builder
    Fluent builder for TransportResponse.
